meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no portfolio. Learn how a streamlined client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code helps you ship fast, high-quality SaaS projects.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is solved by shipping a micro-SaaS product in one weekend. By utilizing Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can create a high-fidelity, functional asset that demonstrates your engineering prowess to potential clients, bypassing the need for a traditional resume.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen, the silence of a non-existent client list echoing in your workspace. You have the skills, but the lack of a portfolio acts as a digital iron curtain, separating you from high-ticket contracts. The industry doesn't care about your resume; it cares about what you can ship, and right now, your repository is empty.

But the game is changing. Modern AI-assisted development allows a lone freelancer to output the work of a three-person dev team in a fraction of the time. We are going to bypass the 'portfolio drought' by building a market-ready utility tool today. This isn't just a project; it's a demonstration of your capability to deliver production-grade software.

steps.title: Define the High-Value Micro-Utility
steps.description: Select a niche problem that takes 5 minutes to solve but saves users hours. We focus on a specific, scalable utility to prove technical depth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior SaaS Architect. Generate a technical specification for a high-utility micro-SaaS tool that solves a specific pain point for content creators, including a database schema and API endpoints.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a project roadmap with a focus on core feature MVP'

steps.title: Bootstrap with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate, ensuring a clean, modular architecture that demonstrates professional coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a full-stack Next.js application with Supabase integration, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure folder structure follows production-grade clean architecture patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'Initialize project boilerplate with Antigravity output'

steps.title: Implement Core Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to rapidly build out the business logic. Focus on error handling and edge cases to showcase your attention to detail.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side logic for the primary utility, including input validation and robust error handling for API responses.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Implement core business logic in /src/services/core-logic.ts'

steps.title: Polishing the User Interface
steps.description: A portfolio project must look premium. We use AI to refine the UI components, ensuring a responsive and visually stunning experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the UI components to use a modern, minimalist design system. Ensure accessibility and mobile-first responsiveness.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Refine UI components for mobile responsiveness and consistent design tokens'

steps.title: Deployment and Documentation
steps.description: Ship to production and document the process. A live link is worth a thousand words in a proposal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional README.md that explains the technical challenges solved, the tech stack, and the business value of this tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate documentation and prepare deployment script for Vercel'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Behind the Code' section in your README to explain why you chose specific architectural patterns.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your most complex functions; clients hire for reliability, not just features.
Deploy your micro-SaaS to a custom domain rather than a .vercel.app subdomain to project a premium brand identity.
Record a 60-second Loom walkthrough of your code structure to include in your portfolio; it builds immense trust with non-technical clients.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that handles high concurrency or complex data processing to show you can handle scale.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, add the live link and a link to the GitHub repository to your LinkedIn profile and your personal landing page. Reach out to three potential clients in your niche with a personalized message about how this tool solves a problem they currently face.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to stop waiting for clients and start showing them exactly what you can do. Every line of code you write is an asset. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
